name: color/overlay/dark
notes: Translucent overlay. Added manually because the student Figma file had no effect styles. Seen in live DOM as modal backdrops / section dividers.

name: color/overlay/subtle
notes: Subtle black overlay at 10% alpha. Added manually. Seen in live DOM as soft shadows / card surfaces.

name: color/overlay/white-80
notes: White at 80% alpha. Used for overlays and disabled states. System-gap discovered in 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/surface/lavender-70
notes: Lavender at ~70% alpha. Used as card surface color. System-gap discovered in 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: typography.17
notes: Body regular — Nunito 16px/400. Confirmed system gap, not candidate: canonical scale had 16/500, 16/600, 16/700, 16/800 but not plain body regular. Added 2026-04-16 from drift report.

name: color/interactive/tab-active
notes: Active state background for the feed tab toggle (togglebutton_activePaid). Identified via authenticated DOM inspection 2026-04-16. Previously flagged as unknown color; reclassified as intentional UI state color.

name: radius/pill
notes: Pill-shape border radius used by the feed tab toggle. Not in the frequency-ranked radius canonicals. Identified via authenticated DOM inspection 2026-04-16.

name: color/overlay/white-20
notes: White at 20% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/overlay/white-40
notes: White at 40% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/overlay/white-72
notes: White at 72% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/surface/lavender-50
notes: Lavender surface at 50% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/surface/mist-40
notes: Mist gray surface at 40% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/overlay/near-black-10
notes: Near-black overlay at 10% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/overlay/dark-10
notes: Dark gray overlay at 10% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/overlay/slate-28
notes: Slate overlay at 28% alpha — matches canonical slate #222a33. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.

name: color/overlay/purple-10
notes: Purple overlay at 10% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
